purpose: Map validator rule IDs to compact repair guidance so APEXlang validation findings can be fed back into the LLM revision loop without guessing.

usage.match: Use the exact issue code from validator output, problems.json, or validation-report.json. If a code is absent, use the nearest owning family only as context and keep the run blocked until the concrete issue is understood.
usage.requiredResponse: For each issue, report rule_id, cause, deterministic_fix, owning_guidance, and verification_result.
usage.repairPolicy: Apply only the smallest artifact change needed to satisfy the reported issue, then rerun the same validator/check that produced it.

verification: Rerun the local APEXlang validator or runtime validate command that produced the issue.
If the issue came from live/compiler validation, preserve the updated problems.json or validation report as evidence.
defaults.fallback: If no deterministic fix can be selected from this catalog and the owning guidance, stop with Required Revisions or Missing Inputs instead of inventing syntax.

ACL_ROLE_DECLARATION_REQUIRED_001.cause: Role-based authorization is referenced but shared ACL role declarations are missing.
ACL_ROLE_DECLARATION_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Create or update shared-components/acl-roles.apx with the referenced roles and align authorization scheme references to those role static IDs.

APEXLANG_LF_LINE_ENDINGS_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Rewrite only the affected .apx files with LF line endings; keep content unchanged.

APP_TEMPLATE_ARTIFACT_LEAK_001.cause: Generated app root contains template-only files or unexpected top-level entries.
APP_TEMPLATE_ARTIFACT_LEAK_001.deterministicFix: Remove leaked scaffold/template docs and keep only .apex, application.apx, deployments, page-groups.apx, pages, shared-components, and supporting-objects.

APP_UX_ACCESSIBILITY_GUIDANCE_REQUIRED_0.cause: The full-app UX contract lacks accessibility or guidance planning.
APP_UX_ACCESSIBILITY_GUIDANCE_REQUIRED_0.deterministicFix: Update .apexlang/app-ux-contract.json and the application spec with page help, item help, report column comments, and accessibility expectations tied to requirements.

APP_UX_BREADCRUMB_HIERARCHY_REQUIRED_001.cause: Full-app composition did not define parent/root breadcrumb hierarchy.
APP_UX_BREADCRUMB_HIERARCHY_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add compositionPlan.breadcrumbs entries for every non-modal page with root, parentEntry, or parentPage, then update shared-components/breadcrumbs.apx accordingly.

APP_UX_CONTRACT_REQUIRED_001.cause: A non-trivial generated app is missing the app UX contract.
APP_UX_CONTRACT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Create project-root .apexlang/app-ux-contract.json with sourceEvidence, pageInventory, compositionPlan, richUiPatternPlan, lovPlan, behaviorPlan, and testPlan before drafting pages.

APP_UX_DISPLAY_MAPPING_REQUIRED_001.cause: The UX contract lacks display-column or display-mapping decisions.
APP_UX_DISPLAY_MAPPING_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add explicit display mappings for reports, forms, cards, content rows, LOVs, and map markers using schema evidence or explicit requirements.

APP_UX_FORM_CONTEXT_REQUIRED_001.cause: A form item that requirements define as context-owned is rendered as an editable input.
APP_UX_FORM_CONTEXT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Change the context-owned parent/key item to a hidden item or hidden-template display state, keep it populated from the launcher mapping, and do not expose it for user editing.

APP_UX_FORM_DEFAULT_REQUIRED_001.cause: A required form defaulting behavior from the UX contract is not implemented in the form artifact.
APP_UX_FORM_DEFAULT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add a deterministic default or dynamic-action set-value behavior that submits the source item, looks up the declared source column, and populates the target item while preserving user override when required.

APP_UX_FORM_VALIDATION_REQUIRED_001.cause: A functional requirement declares a required form validation but the generated page does not implement it.
APP_UX_FORM_VALIDATION_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add a page-level validation using the canonical validation template, associate it with the target item, and include the controlling item/value condition when the requirement is conditional.

APP_UX_HUB_ICON_REQUIRED_001.cause: Management hub launcher entries are text-only or lack descriptions.
APP_UX_HUB_ICON_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add conservative fa-* icon CSS classes and userDefinedAttributes description text to each hub shared-list entry.

APP_UX_LAYOUT_RECIPE_REQUIRED_001.cause: The app UX contract or page draft omitted an explicit layout recipe.
APP_UX_LAYOUT_RECIPE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Record a supported recipe such as dashboard rows, master-detail-content-row, faceted-search shell, or standard body grid, then make emitted layout match it.

APP_UX_LOV_MAPPING_REQUIRED_001.cause: LOV requirements are present but no LOV plan or mapping exists.
APP_UX_LOV_MAPPING_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add lovPlan entries with source object/columns, display value, return value, and consuming page items before emitting LOV-backed items.

APP_UX_PAGE_MISSING_001.cause: A required page from functional requirements or the app plan was not emitted.
APP_UX_PAGE_MISSING_001.deterministicFix: Add the missing page artifact, navigation entry, breadcrumb entry, and any required modal/report targets described by the UX contract.

APP_UX_PATTERN_REQUIRED_001.cause: The app plan lacks a rich UI pattern for a required workflow.
APP_UX_PATTERN_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Select a supported native APEX pattern from requirements and templates, record it in richUiPatternPlan, and regenerate the affected page from that pattern.

APP_UX_TRACEABILITY_REQUIRED_001.cause: Generated UX decisions are not traceable to requirements, schema metadata, or explicit user assertions.
APP_UX_TRACEABILITY_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Populate sourceEvidence and link every page/action/layout/LOV decision to evidence; stop with Missing Inputs for unsupported decisions.

BREADCRUMB_COVERAGE_ENTRY_REQUIRED_001.cause: A non-modal page is missing a shared breadcrumb entry.
BREADCRUMB_COVERAGE_ENTRY_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add a shared-components/breadcrumbs.apx entry for the page with correct pageNumber and parent/root relationship.

BREADCRUMB_COVERAGE_REGION_REQUIRED_001.cause: A page that should show breadcrumbs lacks the page breadcrumb/title-bar region.
BREADCRUMB_COVERAGE_REGION_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add a breadcrumb region using source.breadcrumb: @breadcrumb in breadcrumbBar slot with the title-bar template.

BREADCRUMB_REGION_TITLE_VISIBLE_GENERIC_.cause: A page breadcrumb/title-bar region exposes a generic component-purpose title such as Breadcrumb instead of using the page/current breadcrumb entry title.
BREADCRUMB_REGION_TITLE_VISIBLE_GENERIC_.deterministicFix: Rename the breadcrumb/title-bar region away from generic chrome text, use the current page title/current breadcrumb entry as the title source, and keep live-valid title-bar templateOptions such as standalone #DEFAULT#.

BREADCRUMB_RULE_PARENT_SCOPE_001.cause: Breadcrumb parentEntry is emitted in the wrong block.
BREADCRUMB_RULE_PARENT_SCOPE_001.deterministicFix: Move parentEntry inside the breadcrumb entry appearance block; do not leave it as a top-level entry property.

CLASSIC_REPORT_COMPONENT_APPEARANCE_REQU.cause: Classic Report omits the required report component template block.
CLASSIC_REPORT_COMPONENT_APPEARANCE_REQU.deterministicFix: Add componentAppearance with template: @/standard and the canonical component templateOptions array.

CLASSIC_REPORT_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_REQUIRED.cause: Classic Report wrapper or report template options drift from the canonical default.
CLASSIC_REPORT_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_REQUIRED.deterministicFix: Set appearance.template to @/standard unless a documented variant applies, and set componentAppearance.templateOptions to #DEFAULT#, t-Report--stretch, and t-Report--horizontalBorders only.

CLASSIC_REPORT_CONTEXTUAL_INFO_TEMPLATE_.cause: A Contextual Info Classic Report does not use the required hidden-but-accessible header and remove-UI-decoration template options.
CLASSIC_REPORT_CONTEXTUAL_INFO_TEMPLATE_.deterministicFix: For appearance.template @/contextual-info, set appearance.templateOptions to exactly #DEFAULT#, t-Region--hideHeader js-addHiddenHeadingRoleDesc, and t-Region--noUI.

CLASSIC_REPORT_HIDDEN_COLUMN_HEADING_FOR.cause: A hidden Classic Report column includes a heading block.
CLASSIC_REPORT_HIDDEN_COLUMN_HEADING_FOR.deterministicFix: Remove heading from hidden Classic Report columns while keeping comments/source metadata as needed.

CONTENT_ROW_ACTION_MENU_REQUIRED_001.cause: Content Row actions are missing the expected action-menu structure.
CONTENT_ROW_ACTION_MENU_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add the documented Content Row action/menu child structure from the selected template, preserving row identity and target mappings.

CONTENT_ROW_SELECTION_ITEMS_REQUIRED_001.cause: Content Row rowSelection mode lacks required same-page support items or uses incompatible properties.
CONTENT_ROW_SELECTION_ITEMS_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: For focusOnly, emit only type. For singleSelection, add currentSelectionPageItem and matching hidden item. For multipleSelection, add currentSelectionPageItem, selectAllPageItem, hidden item, and checkbox item.

CONTENT_ROW_SETTINGS_SUBSTITUTION_REQUIR.cause: Content Row display settings reference query columns as bare aliases.
CONTENT_ROW_SETTINGS_SUBSTITUTION_REQUIR.deterministicFix: Rewrite column-backed overline/title/description/miscellaneous settings as &COLUMN_NAME. substitutions; leave true literals unchanged.

DASHBOARD_LAYOUT_ROW_PLAN_REQUIRED_001.cause: Dashboard regions were emitted without a row plan or the emitted rows do not match the plan.
DASHBOARD_LAYOUT_ROW_PLAN_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Create one layout_row_plan entry per physical row, split stacked full-width detail/context/cards sections into separate one-region entries, replace generic dashboard-chart-flow with explicit two-up-equal/three-up-equal chart rows, then set startNewRow false only for second-and-later regions in each planned row.

DASHBOARD_KPI_METRIC_CARD_REQUIRED_001.cause: A dashboard KPI was emitted as a Classic Report instead of a Metric Card component.
DASHBOARD_KPI_METRIC_CARD_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Replace single-value KPI Classic Reports with one normalized themeTemplateComponent/metricCard region using one source row per KPI, preserving required labels, values, icons, and metadata.

DEFAULT_GUIDANCE_LAYER_REQUIRED_001.cause: Generated pages/items/report columns lack concise user guidance or developer comments.
DEFAULT_GUIDANCE_LAYER_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add page help, item help for editable/filter/control items, and comments for important report columns using behavior-aware wording.

COMPILER_TRUTH_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTES_STAL.cause: The curated component-attributes provenance does not match the active compiler metadata.
COMPILER_TRUTH_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTES_STAL.deterministicFix: Refresh assets/component-attributes.json provenance from the active compiler metadata while preserving curated_subset scope, then rerun compiler-truth audit with --verify-component-attributes.

DISPLAY_ONLY_SOURCE_TYPE_INVALID_001.cause: Display-only item source settings are not in the supported shape.
DISPLAY_ONLY_SOURCE_TYPE_INVALID_001.deterministicFix: Use the supported displayOnly source/settings contract and ensure settings.sendOnPageSubmit: false is present.

DRAWER_POSITION_DEFAULT_END_REQUIRED_001.cause: Drawer modal/dialog position does not use the default end/right placement.
DRAWER_POSITION_DEFAULT_END_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Set drawer appearance.templateOptions to the live-valid end/right value js-dialog-class-t-Drawer--pullOutEnd unless explicit requirements and compiler truth prove another position.

DSL_MULTILINE_STRUCTURE_REQUIRED_001.cause: APEXlang structural blocks or sibling properties were compressed onto one line.
DSL_MULTILINE_STRUCTURE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Expand object-valued properties and sibling assignments so each structural property is on its own line with normal nested indentation.

FACET_DATE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.cause: A date/time facet uses non-date runtime metadata.
FACET_DATE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Set source.dataType: date for date/time facet columns such as DATE, DATETIME, TIMESTAMP, CREATED_AT, or UPDATED_AT.

FACET_ENTITY_ID_DISPLAY_REQUIRED_001.cause: A facet exposes technical IDs instead of business display labels.
FACET_ENTITY_ID_DISPLAY_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Join or map the facet to a display column/LOV and show the entity name while returning/filtering by the key where needed.

FACET_LIST_ENTRIES_LIMIT_REQUIRED_001.cause: Checkbox/radio facets have unbounded value lists or unsuitable max displayed entries.
FACET_LIST_ENTRIES_LIMIT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add listEntries.maxDisplayedEntries using 10 by default, constrained to the documented 5-15 range.

FACET_RANGE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.cause: A range facet does not use a runtime-safe numeric or date type.
FACET_RANGE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Set source.dataType to number for numeric ranges or date for date/time ranges; do not use varchar2/string tokens.

FACET_SOURCE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.cause: Facet source.dataType is missing where required or uses an unsupported token such as varchar2.
FACET_SOURCE_DATA_TYPE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Use only source.dataType: date or source.dataType: number where required; omit source.dataType for string/discrete facets.

FACET_VALUE_FILTER_INITIAL_REQUIRED_001.cause: Likely high-cardinality facet does not show the value filter initially.
FACET_VALUE_FILTER_INITIAL_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add listEntries.displayFilterInitially: true for Product, Customer, Store, Employee, Supplier, Email, SKU, name/title, and similar high-cardinality facets.

FA_ICON_REQUIRED_001.cause: An icon-bearing property uses a non-Font APEX icon token, custom CSS icon alias, image icon, or framework-specific icon class.
FA_ICON_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Replace the value with a conservative Font APEX fa-* class such as fa-table, fa-users, fa-map-marker, fa-package, fa-image, fa-filter, fa-edit, or fa-plus.

FACETED_SEARCH_CURRENT_FACETS_SELECTOR_I.cause: Current facets selector or target region wiring is invalid.
FACETED_SEARCH_CURRENT_FACETS_SELECTOR_I.deterministicFix: Point the current-facets component at the owning faceted-search region using the documented selector/static ID pattern.

FORM_EDIT_ALLOWED_OPERATIONS_LEGACY_001.cause: Form edit behavior uses a legacy allowedOperations shape.
FORM_EDIT_ALLOWED_OPERATIONS_LEGACY_001.deterministicFix: Replace legacy allowedOperations with the current operation flags/settings accepted by the form template and compiler metadata.

FORM_EDIT_OPERATION_FLAG_INVALID_001.cause: Form edit operation flags are inconsistent or invalid.
FORM_EDIT_OPERATION_FLAG_INVALID_001.deterministicFix: Set insert/update/delete operation flags to match the page purpose and remove unsupported legacy flags.

FORM_PRIMARY_KEY_REQUIRED_001.cause: A form source lacks an explicit primary key item/column mapping.
FORM_PRIMARY_KEY_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add the primary key page item and mark the corresponding form/source metadata as the primary key.

GENERIC_HELP_TEXT_FORBIDDEN_001.cause: Help text is placeholder, generic, or just repeats the label.
GENERIC_HELP_TEXT_FORBIDDEN_001.deterministicFix: Replace with concise behavior-aware guidance using format, purpose, LOV semantics, or validation requirements.

HIDDEN_ITEM_SSP_REQUIRED_001.cause: Hidden item session state protection does not match ownership.
HIDDEN_ITEM_SSP_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Use checksumRequiredSessionLevel for protected server-owned hidden data; use unrestricted plus the canonical comments rationale for same-page client-owned dynamic-action state.

IMAGE_UPLOAD_LEGACY_PROPERTY_FORBIDDEN_0.cause: Image upload item uses legacy or unsupported properties.
IMAGE_UPLOAD_LEGACY_PROPERTY_FORBIDDEN_0.deterministicFix: Remove legacy image upload properties and emit only the current compiler-supported image upload blocks/properties.

INTERACTIVE_REPORT_LINK_COLUMN_INVALID_0.cause: Interactive Report link column uses invalid URL-style or alias wiring.
INTERACTIVE_REPORT_LINK_COLUMN_INVALID_0.deterministicFix: Use declarative same-app page target syntax when navigating inside the app, with explicit target page and item mappings.

IR_CONTEXT_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED_001.cause: Interactive Report SQL references page item binds without submitting them.
IR_CONTEXT_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add every referenced same-page bind item to source.pageItemsToSubmit.

IR_PROJECTED_COLUMNS_REQUIRED_001.cause: Interactive Report source projects columns without matching column metadata.
IR_PROJECTED_COLUMNS_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Emit explicit column definitions for every SQL/table projection, including hidden technical columns with headings.

IR_TEXT_SEARCH_CASE_NORMALIZATION_REQUIR.cause: Interactive Report text search/filter SQL is not case-normalized.
IR_TEXT_SEARCH_CASE_NORMALIZATION_REQUIR.deterministicFix: Normalize both searched expression and bind/filter value consistently, typically with upper(...) or lower(...), while preserving bind usage.

MAP_INITIAL_VIEWPORT_BOUNDS_REQUIRED_001.cause: Map initial viewport uses average latitude/longitude with a fixed zoom for multi-marker data.
MAP_INITIAL_VIEWPORT_BOUNDS_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Replace average-center/fixed-zoom SQL with a boundingBox query using min/max longitude and latitude over the same filtered dataset, or omit fixed zoom for fit-to-data behavior.

MAP_LAYER_CONTEXT_BIND_REQUIRED_001.cause: Map layer SQL reads selected context through v()/nv() or string-built session-state names.
MAP_LAYER_CONTEXT_BIND_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Replace v()/nv() session-state reads with normal bind syntax such as :P7_STATUS and add explicit refresh behavior for the dependent map.

MAP_LAYER_CONTEXT_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED_0.cause: Map layer SQL references page item binds but does not submit them.
MAP_LAYER_CONTEXT_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED_0.deterministicFix: Query compiler truth for the active build before adding map-layer source.pageItemsToSubmit; if unavailable for the selected layer shape, use explicit refresh/session-state-safe behavior instead.

MASTER_DETAIL_CHILD_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED.cause: Child report SQL depends on the master context item without submitting that item.
MASTER_DETAIL_CHILD_BIND_SUBMIT_REQUIRED.deterministicFix: Add the hidden master context item to the child report source.pageItemsToSubmit.

MASTER_DETAIL_CONTENT_ROW_ACTION_REQUIRE.cause: Master Content Row does not set the same-page context item through a full-row action.
MASTER_DETAIL_CONTENT_ROW_ACTION_REQUIRE.deterministicFix: Add a fullRowLink action that sets the hidden context item from the parent primary key substitution; do not rely on rowSelection alone.

MASTER_DETAIL_CONTENT_ROW_TEMPLATE_REQUI.cause: A visible master-detail Content Row parent uses a blank/structural region shell instead of standard visible region chrome.
MASTER_DETAIL_CONTENT_ROW_TEMPLATE_REQUI.deterministicFix: Set the master Content Row appearance block to template @/standard with templateOptions #DEFAULT#; keep @/blank-with-attributes only for structural containers or dashboard KPI strips.

MASTER_DETAIL_DYNAMIC_ACTION_REQUIRED_00.cause: Master-detail selection is implemented through URL reloads or child regions are not refreshed after context change.
MASTER_DETAIL_DYNAMIC_ACTION_REQUIRED_00.deterministicFix: Use dynamic-action/declarative behavior to set the hidden context item and refresh every dependent child region after selection.

MASTER_DETAIL_LAYOUT_REQUIRED_001.cause: Master-detail page uses an inappropriate shell or layout, such as leftColumn for a Content Row master.
MASTER_DETAIL_LAYOUT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Use standard page template with an asymmetric BODY row: parent Content Row first with columnSpan 3/4 and child region second with startNewRow: false.

MASTER_DETAIL_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS_REQUIRED_0.cause: Required child create/edit/detail actions are missing or placed on the wrong toolbar.
MASTER_DETAIL_TOOLBAR_ACTIONS_REQUIRED_0.deterministicFix: Add parent edit, child create, and child edit/detail actions according to the UX contract; page-level create goes in breadcrumb/title bar, child actions go in child report toolbar.

MASTER_DETAIL_VISIBLE_SELECTOR_REGRESSIO.cause: Master-detail context is represented as a visible selector even though a parent row list exists.
MASTER_DETAIL_VISIBLE_SELECTOR_REGRESSIO.deterministicFix: Replace the visible selector with a protected hidden context item driven by the parent Content Row selection.

METRIC_CARD_REGION_NORMALIZATION_REQUIRE.cause: Dashboard metrics were emitted as multiple fake/static card regions instead of a normalized Metric Card region.
METRIC_CARD_REGION_NORMALIZATION_REQUIRE.deterministicFix: Use one Metric Card region with a normalized multi-row source, usually UNION ALL with one row per metric.

METRIC_CARD_STANDARD_TEMPLATE_FORBIDDEN_.cause: Dashboard KPI Metric Card uses standard chrome where blank/attribute chrome is expected.
METRIC_CARD_STANDARD_TEMPLATE_FORBIDDEN_.deterministicFix: Use the documented blank-with-attributes/region appearance for KPI strips unless requirements explicitly need a titled wrapper.

MODAL_REPORT_LAUNCH_REQUIRED_001.cause: A modal report/form target exists but no launcher action links to it.
MODAL_REPORT_LAUNCH_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add a report row action, map layer link, button, or menu action that opens the declared modal target with required item mappings.

MODAL_REPORT_REFRESH_REQUIRED_001.cause: A report that launches a modal form is not refreshed when the dialog closes.
MODAL_REPORT_REFRESH_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add dialog-closed dynamic-action/declarative refresh behavior for the launching report/grid/map region.

PAGE_ACTION_BREADCRUMB_REQUIRED_001.cause: Primary page-level create button is anchored to a report/result region instead of the breadcrumb/title-bar region.
PAGE_ACTION_BREADCRUMB_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Move page-level Create/Add buttons to the breadcrumb region, usually layout.region: @breadcrumb and an appropriate title-bar action slot.

PARENT_CHILD_ACTION_COVERAGE_REQUIRED_00.cause: A parent-child UX contract records context wiring but omits required edit/create/detail action coverage.
PARENT_CHILD_ACTION_COVERAGE_REQUIRED_00.deterministicFix: Add behaviorPlan.parentChildContext.actionCoverage entries for parent edit, child create, child edit/detail, and page-level create behaviors, then materialize the corresponding Content Row actions, report links/buttons, and breadcrumb page actions.

PAGE_ITEM_LAYOUT_LABEL_COL_SPAN_LEGACY_0.cause: Page item layout uses legacy labelColSpan naming.
PAGE_ITEM_LAYOUT_LABEL_COL_SPAN_LEGACY_0.deterministicFix: Replace legacy labelColSpan with the current supported item layout property or omit it when the template default is sufficient.

PAGE_ITEM_REGION_SLOT_REQUIRED_001.cause: Page item layout does not target the correct parent region slot.
PAGE_ITEM_REGION_SLOT_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Set layout.region and layout.slot according to the parent region contract, typically regionBody for form/static item containers.

PAGE0_GLOBAL_PAGE_MINIMAL_001.cause: Page 0 contains security/page-level properties or non-minimal components not requested for every page.
PAGE0_GLOBAL_PAGE_MINIMAL_001.deterministicFix: Restore the canonical minimal global page skeleton and remove security/authentication/pageAccessProtection from Page 0.

PLSQL_INLINE_BLOCK_001.cause: Inline PL/SQL body exceeds the APEX artifact size gate.
PLSQL_INLINE_BLOCK_001.deterministicFix: Extract reusable/oversized logic to a package API, then call it through invokeApi for page processes or executeCode for appProcess only where required.

PUBLIC_PAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED_001.cause: A non-login page is public without explicit security rationale.
PUBLIC_PAGE_REVIEW_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Apply mustNotBePublicUser or a stricter authorization scheme, or add explicit security-review rationale when the page must remain public.

REPORT_ESCAPE_REQUIRED_001.cause: Report/grid column escaping is disabled without an approved formatting pattern.
REPORT_ESCAPE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Restore escaping by default; move reviewed markup to declarative columnFormatting.htmlExpression using escaped substitutions if needed.

REPORT_SQL_HTML_LITERAL_FORBIDDEN_001.cause: Report SQL/PLSQL source emits HTML tags or inline presentation markup.
REPORT_SQL_HTML_LITERAL_FORBIDDEN_001.deterministicFix: Keep SQL data-only and move presentation to declarative column formatting with escaped substitutions.

SAVED_REPORT_VISIBILITY_LEGACY_001.cause: Interactive Grid/Report saved report visibility uses a legacy value.
SAVED_REPORT_VISIBILITY_LEGACY_001.deterministicFix: Replace legacy saved-report visibility values with the current compiler-supported visibility contract.

SECURITY_BASELINE_REQUIRED_001.cause: Generated business app or page misses the required security baseline.
SECURITY_BASELINE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add sessionStateProtection checksumSalt at app root, pageAccessProtection on non-Page 0 pages, mustNotBePublicUser by default, and session timeout defaults.

PAGE_ALIAS_FILENAME_MISMATCH_001.cause: The canonical page filename slug does not match the page alias.
PAGE_ALIAS_FILENAME_MISMATCH_001.deterministicFix: Update the page alias to the uppercase filename slug, for example p00001-home.apx must declare alias: HOME, or rename the file to match the intended alias.

PAGE_FILENAME_NUMBER_MISMATCH_001.cause: The canonical page filename number does not match the page declaration.
PAGE_FILENAME_NUMBER_MISMATCH_001.deterministicFix: Update the page declaration number or rename the file so pNNNNN-*.apx and page N agree.

SMART_FILTER_MAP_TARGET_COLUMNS_REQUIRED.cause: Smart Filters target a map region whose layer source does not project/filter the required columns.
SMART_FILTER_MAP_TARGET_COLUMNS_REQUIRED.deterministicFix: Retarget Smart Filters to a companion report/cards results region and refresh the sibling map explicitly.

SMART_FILTER_MAP_TARGET_UNSUPPORTED_001.cause: Smart Filters target a map region directly, which is not valid for the current generation contract.
SMART_FILTER_MAP_TARGET_UNSUPPORTED_001.deterministicFix: Create or use a companion report/cards results region as filteredRegion, keep the map as a sibling visualization, and refresh the map explicitly after Smart Filter changes.

SMART_FILTER_RESULTS_REGION_ORDER_REQUIR.cause: Smart Filters are not ordered before their result region.
SMART_FILTER_RESULTS_REGION_ORDER_REQUIR.deterministicFix: Set layout/sequence so Smart Filters render before the results region they control.

SMART_FILTER_RESULTS_REGION_REQUIRED_001.cause: Smart Filters do not have a valid results region target.
SMART_FILTER_RESULTS_REGION_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add or reference a supported report/cards-style results region such as Classic Report, Interactive Report/Grid, Cards, or Content Row; do not target maps or filter components.

SMART_FILTER_SETTINGS_UNSUPPORTED_001.cause: A Smart Filters region emits settings unsupported by APEX 26.1 compiler metadata.
SMART_FILTER_SETTINGS_UNSUPPORTED_001.deterministicFix: Remove the Smart Filters settings block and express counts, exports, and UX affordances through the filtered results region unless compiler truth for the active build proves a valid settings group.

SMART_FILTER_SEARCH_SOURCE_REQUIRED_001.cause: Smart Filters search source or filtered columns are missing.
SMART_FILTER_SEARCH_SOURCE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Define the source database columns/search configuration and align them with the target results region source.

SQL_INLINE_BLOCK_001.cause: Inline SQL body exceeds the APEX artifact size gate.
SQL_INLINE_BLOCK_001.deterministicFix: Extract the query to a secure view or shorter API-backed source, then point the APEX artifact at that view/source.

SQL_PLSQL_LOB_COMPARISON_KEY_FORBIDDEN_0.cause: SQL/PLSQL compares or sorts raw LOB values as keys.
SQL_PLSQL_LOB_COMPARISON_KEY_FORBIDDEN_0.deterministicFix: Use scalar keys, filename/MIME metadata, timestamps, checksum/hash, or dbms_lob.getlength for file size instead of raw LOB comparison.

STATIC_ID_WHERE_LOWER_REQUIRED_001.cause: Static IDs or where-like identifiers use uppercase/mixed-case patterns that violate the local convention.
STATIC_ID_WHERE_LOWER_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Normalize generated static IDs/selectors to lowercase kebab/snake style and update references consistently.

STATIC_REGION_METRIC_CARD_FAKE_FORBIDDEN.cause: A dashboard metric is faked with static regions instead of a Metric Card component.
STATIC_REGION_METRIC_CARD_FAKE_FORBIDDEN.deterministicFix: Replace fake static metric cards with a real Metric Card region using the documented normalized source pattern.

TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_DEFAULT_ATOMIC_001.cause: #DEFAULT# is concatenated with another template option or not emitted as its own value.
TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_DEFAULT_ATOMIC_001.deterministicFix: Keep #DEFAULT# as a standalone templateOptions entry and keep documented composite option strings atomic.

TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_MULTILINE_REQUIRED_001.cause: Multi-value templateOptions are inline or comma-compressed.
TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_MULTILINE_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Emit bracketed multi-line templateOptions arrays with one accepted value per line.

TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_STALE_VALUE_001.cause: A templateOptions entry uses a stale static ID or CSS token rejected by the live compiler/theme contract.
TEMPLATE_OPTIONS_STALE_VALUE_001.deterministicFix: Replace the stale value with the live-valid emitted value, such as js-dialog-class-t-Drawer--pullOutEnd for drawer end/right, or standalone #DEFAULT# for title-bar breadcrumbs.

THEME_BASE_THEME_REQUIRED_001.deterministicFix: Add the required baseTheme value from the scaffold/theme template and keep theme vocabulary canonical for the supported APEXlang build.
